title: Double Vision 168
description: Double Vision 168 is a complete 6U video instrument in a self-contained case: a ready-to-perform LZX system with display integration—targeted at gallery, studio, and stage setups where you want a finished instrument rather than a blank rack start. What ships in the box, hookup, and sub-module roles: Manual. Specs for configuration.
